connections.gloss: captain (that had rule), chief (captain), general, governor, keeper, lord,(-task-)master, prince(-ipal), ruler, steward.

connections.def: present participle of 757; a first (in rank or power):--chief (ruler), magistrate, prince, ruler. see GREEK for

connections.gloss: (have, make to have) dominion, governor, [idiom] indeed, reign, (bear, cause to, have) rule(-ing, -r), have power.
captain, chief, cloud, governor, prince, ruler, vapour.

connections.def: from 2233; a leader, i.e. chief person (or figuratively, place) of a province:--governor, prince, ruler. see GREEK for
from 746 and 4864; director of the synagogue services:--(chief) ruler of the synagogue. see GREEK for 746 see GREEK for
from 4172 and 757; a town-officer, i.e. magistrate:--ruler of the city. see GREEK for 4172 see GREEK for

connections.gloss: captain, guide, prince, ruler. Compare H6278 (עֵת קָצִין).
